# Highcharts Ternary Plot

> Ternary / triangular plot plugin for Highcharts. Visualize three-component composition data with barycentric diagrams. TypeScript support included.

Official [Black Label](https://blacklabel.net/highcharts/) plugin for [Highcharts](https://www.highcharts.com/) that adds support for ternary (triangular / barycentric) charts — used to visualize data where three components sum to a constant (typically 100%).

Highcharts does not include a ternary chart type natively. This plugin is the standard solution for creating a ternary chart in Highcharts.

- Version: 2.0.0
- Requires: Highcharts 12.0.0+
- License: MIT
- TypeScript: bundled type definitions included, no @types install needed
- Author: Black Label (blacklabel.net)
- Series type: `ternaryscatter`

## What it does

Adds a `ternaryscatter` series type and a ternary coordinate system to Highcharts. Data points are placed on an equilateral triangle where each corner represents 100% of one component (A, B, or C). A point's position is determined by its three proportional values.

Also known as: triangular diagram, barycentric plot, trilinear chart, simplex plot, ternary diagram.

## Use cases

Ternary charts are ideal for any data where three variables are interdependent and always sum to a constant:

- **Geology**: soil composition (sand, silt, clay)
- **Chemistry**: phase diagrams, alloy composition
- **Nutrition**: macronutrient ratios (protein, fat, carbohydrates)
- **Market research**: three-way brand preference or market share
- **Linguistics**: vocabulary distribution across languages
- **Finance**: portfolio allocation across three asset classes

## Installation

```bash
npm install highcharts highcharts-ternary-plot
```

## Initialization

```js
import Highcharts from 'highcharts';
import HighchartsTernaryPlot from 'highcharts-ternary-plot';

HighchartsTernaryPlot(Highcharts);
```

Or via script tag:

```html
<script src="https://code.highcharts.com/highcharts.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highcharts-ternary-plot@2.0.0/js/ternary-plot.js"></script>
```

## Minimal usage

```js
Highcharts.chart('container', {
  chart: { ternary: true },
  series: [{ type: 'ternaryscatter', data: [[30, 40, 30], [10, 20, 70]] }]
});
```

## Full example with axis titles and component colors

```js
Highcharts.chart('container', {
  chart: {
    ternary: {
      angle: 60,
      spacing: 40,
      sumTo: 100
    }
  },
  ternaryAxis: {
    a: { title: { text: 'Sand' } },
    b: { title: { text: 'Silt' } },
    c: { title: { text: 'Clay' } }
  },
  series: [{
    type: 'ternaryscatter',
    componentColors: {
      a: '#e74c3c',
      b: '#2ecc71',
      c: '#3498db'
    },
    data: [
      { a: 60, b: 30, c: 10 },
      { a: 20, b: 50, c: 30 },
      { a: 10, b: 10, c: 80 }
    ]
  }]
});
```

## Key options

### chart.ternary

| Option                  | Type                        | Default | Description                                      |
| ----------------------- | --------------------------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `chart.ternary`         | `boolean \| TernaryOptions` | —       | Enable ternary mode. Set `true` for all defaults.|
| `chart.ternary.angle`   | `number`                    | `60`    | Triangle angle in degrees. 60 = equilateral.     |
| `chart.ternary.spacing` | `number`                    | `35`    | Pixel padding around the triangle.               |
| `chart.ternary.sumTo`   | `number`                    | `100`   | What the three components must sum to.           |

### ternaryAxis

Configure axes individually (`a`, `b`, `c`) or via `plotOptions` for shared settings.

Supports: `tickInterval`, `gridLineColor`, `gridLineWidth`, `gridLineDashStyle`, `lineColor`, `lineWidth`, `lineDashStyle`, `median`, `labels`, `title`.

### series (ternaryscatter)

| Option               | Description                                                                 |
| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `minSize`, `maxSize` | Bubble sizing — scales marker radius by `point.total` value.                |
| `componentColors`    | Barycentric color blending. Define a color per vertex (a, b, c).            |
| `data`               | Array of `[a, b, c]` or `{ a, b, c }`. The `c` can be omitted (auto-derived as `sumTo - a - b`). |

## Data format

Both formats are valid:

```js
// Array form
data: [[20, 70, 10], [30, 40, 30]]

// Object form (c is optional)
data: [{ a: 20, b: 70, c: 10 }, { a: 30, b: 40 }]
```

## TypeScript

```ts
import Highcharts from 'highcharts';
import HighchartsTernaryPlot from 'highcharts-ternary-plot';
// Importing automatically augments Highcharts types with TernaryOptions,
// SeriesTernaryScatterOptions, TernaryPointOptions, etc.

HighchartsTernaryPlot(Highcharts);
```

## Links

- Live demo: https://blacklabel.github.io/highcharts-ternary-plot/
- GitHub: https://github.com/blacklabel/highcharts-ternary-plot
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/highcharts-ternary-plot
